title: TeleportSuite
description: TeleportSuite is your server's definitive TPA and TPAHere solution, featuring clickable accepts, request cooldowns, and robust admin commands.
body:
# TeleportSuite  teleportation, Perfected.

Welcome to **TeleportSuite**, the second installment in ArkFlame Development's ambitious project to provide the Minecraft community with a complete suite of perfected, free, and open-source plugins. Following the upload of `FlameHomes`, TeleportSuite tackles player-to-player teleportation with the same philosophy: deliver premium features, rock-solid performance, and deep customization without the premium price tag.

This plugin replaces any basic TPA system with a modern, feature-rich, and incredibly intuitive alternative. It's designed to be a drop-in solution that just works, enhancing the social experience on any survival, SMP, or community-focused server.

## ✨ Features

*   **Complete Request System:** Full implementation of `/tpa` (teleport to a player) and `/tpahere` (request a player to come to you).
*   **Interactive Chat:** Players receive requests with clickable `[Accept]` and `[Deny]` buttons directly in chat for instant responses.
*   **Request Timeouts:** All pending teleport requests automatically expire after a configurable time, preventing clutter.
*   **Spam Prevention:** A configurable cooldown between sending requests stops players from spamming others.
*   **Teleport Toggling:** Players can use `/tptoggle` to temporarily disable receiving any TPA requests.
*   **Combat Logging Prevention:** A configurable teleport warmup requires players to stand still, preventing them from escaping combat.
*   **Full Economy Support (Vault):** Optionally charge players a fee for sending `/tpa` or `/tpahere` requests.
*   **PlaceholderAPI Ready:** Includes a `%teleportsuite_toggled%` placeholder to show if a player is accepting requests.
*   **Fully Translatable:** Every single message is customizable through the language files (`lang/en.yml`, `lang/es.yml`, etc.).
*   **Custom Sounds:** Configure sound effects for sending requests, receiving them, and successful teleports to provide players with audio feedback.
*   **Powerful Admin Tools:** Includes force-teleport commands like `/tp` and `/tphere` for staff.
*   **Broad Compatibility:** Meticulously coded to support all server versions from **1.8 to 1.21+** on Java 8 or higher.

## ⚙️ Commands & Permissions

### Player Commands
*   `/tpa <player>` - Send a request to teleport to another player.
*   `/tpahere <player>` - Send a request for another player to teleport to you.
*   `/tpaccept [player]` - Accept the most recent teleport request.
*   `/tpdeny [player]` - Deny the most recent teleport request.
*   `/tptoggle` - Toggle your ability to receive teleport requests.

### Admin Commands
*   `/tp <player> [target]` - Force-teleport yourself to a player, or one player to another.
*   `/tphere <player>` - Force-teleport a player to your location.
*   `/teleportsuite reload` - Reloads the plugin's configuration.

### Core Permissions
*   `teleportsuite.tpa` - Access to `/tpa`. (Default: true)
*   `teleportsuite.tpahere` - Access to `/tpahere`. (Default: true)
*   `teleportsuite.tpaccept` / `tpdeny` - Access to accept/deny commands. (Default: true)
*   `teleportsuite.tptoggle` - Access to `/tptoggle`. (Default: true)
*   `teleportsuite.admin.tp` - Access to `/tp`. (Default: op)
*   `teleportsuite.admin.tphere` - Access to `/tphere`. (Default: op)
*   `teleportsuite.admin.reload` - Access to the reload command. (Default: op)
*   `teleportsuite.bypass.cooldown` - Ignore the request sending cooldown.
*   `teleportsuite.bypass.warmup` - Teleport instantly, ignoring the warmup.
*   `teleportsuite.bypass.cost` - Send requests for free.

## 🔌 Dependencies

*   **Vault** (Optional): Required if you want to enable economy features.
*   **PlaceholderAPI** (Optional): Required to use the provided placeholders.

## 🚀 Our Mission

TeleportSuite is another step towards our goal of creating the ultimate free plugin suite for server owners. We believe essential server mechanics should be powerful, reliable, and accessible to everyone. By choosing our plugins, you're supporting a project dedicated to quality and community. Stay tuned for more releases
